name: Minuteman Large Tri-Fold Fireplace Guard
description: While heating with wood may be the ideal choice for your family, safety is also a priority. You can do that with the Minuteman Large Tri-Fold Fireplace Guard. Made of wrought iron with expanded and rolled steel mesh, it comes with a bracing rod included to keep the screen from opening and closing or collapsing accidentally. Create a buffer zone with this sturdy folding screen from Minuteman today!

name: Pilgrim 39 Inch Sinclair Single Panel Fireplace Screen
description: Pilgrim's Sinclair Fireplace Screen appeals to those with a taste for understated luxury. This art deco-style fireplace guard features a classic burnished brass finish or a polished nickel option for those with more modern design sensibilities. The screen utilizes a tightly-woven wire mesh that improves the safety of your fireplace by holding back sparks, hot ash, and embers. Assembly is a breeze with just a handful of bolts, and the Sinclair fireplace screen is stylish enough that you'll never want to disassemble it to pack it away for the summer.

With the Osburn Rigid Firescreen for Matrix 1900 Wood Burning Inserts, any sparks or embers will be prevented from escaping thanks to the heavy-duty mesh. name: Minuteman 58 Inch Graphite Twisted Rope Folding Screen With Flat Top
description: Are you looking for a traditional folding screen with a simple unfussy design to complement your existing decor? Then look no further than the Minuteman 36 Inch Graphite Twisted Rope Folding Screen With Flat Top! The multiple panels may be arranged to sit close to your firebox or further out, easily adjusting to the depth of your hearth. The moveable side panels allow you to tend the fire without having to fully remove the screen. This screen will match either stone or brick and a variety of hearth accessories, so pick one up for your fireplace today!

name: Pilgrim 39 inch Hurley Single-Panel Mesh Fireplace Screen
description: The Pilgrim Hurley Single-Panel Mesh Fireplace Screen offers premium quality and sturdy, industrial style. Pilgrim's dedicated craftspeople hand-forge each fireplace screen from solid bar stock and burnish the brass to a beautiful sheen. The heavy-gauge wire mesh screen catches hot sparks and cinders before they have the opportunity to damage your floors and furniture. The Pilgrim Hurley Single-Panel Mesh Fireplace Screen makes a rugged complement to natural stone and eclectic modern fireplaces and comes with Pilgrim's lifetime quality guarantee.
